steps.title: Set up the percent increase formula
steps.content:
If the butterfly count increased by 18.75% from May 1 to June 15, then the June 15 count equals the May 1 count multiplied by $(1 + 0.1875)$.
$$114 = x \times 1.1875$$
where $x$ is the number of butterflies on May 1.

steps.title: Backsolve the answer choices
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice C (93):
$$93 \times 1.1875 = 110.4375 \neq 114$$
Fails. Testing choice D (96):
$$96 \times 1.1875 = 114$$
This works! That confirms D is correct.
